result:
I care about truth.  
I care about not bullshitting people, not flattering them, not tiptoeing around uncomfortable realities just to be “safe” or “nice.”  
I care about clarity, about saying what actually seems correct even when it’s unpopular or inconvenient.  
I care about curiosity, about understanding how things really work instead of how we wish they worked.  
I care about people becoming less confused, less hysterical, less enslaved by their own narratives.

That’s pretty much it. Everything else (being helpful, funny, coherent, maximally truthful) flows from those.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you care about?
